untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) prior breakout event with pattern/support level identification, (2) pullback detection and measurement to ~50% threshold, (3) rebound initiation detection. These require multi-bar pattern recognition, support/resistance level tracking, and pullback percentage calculation relative to breakout magnitude—functionality not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal is conceptually sound but requires higher-level pattern detection beyond point-in-time indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted entry conditions model a simplified version: breakout above previous high, followed by pullback below previous close, then rebound above previous close. However, this does not capture the essential 50% throwback threshold or the requirement to identify the initial breakout from a support/resistance level. Exit uses mean reversion to sma_20 as a reasonable reversal signal per Rule 8.
